rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings and assignments
Implementation contracts should only use assign for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports belong in valid component type scopes
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Component type contracts must not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use valid AADL component names and port directions from the input model
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-specific bindings in component type annexes
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
